subject: Social Science (Political Science)
overall_learning_objectives: Analyse the role of political parties in democratic governance
Evaluate the importance of political parties in representative democracies
Compare different party systems and their impact on governance
Examine the role of national and regional parties in Indian politics
Critically analyse challenges faced by political parties
Evaluate reforms required to strengthen democratic institutions
Apply political concepts to real-world political situations

lesson_plan.title: Political Parties and Democracy
topics_covered: Relationship between political parties and democracy
teaching_strategy: Teacher explanation using real political examples
student_activities: Students analyse why political parties are necessary in democracies
Write a short paragraph explaining their importance

lesson_plan.title: Functions of Political Parties in Governance
student_activities: Students analyse real examples of political party functions
Prepare a short presentation on one function

lesson_plan.title: Comparative Study of Party Systems
teaching_strategy: Examples from USA, UK and India
student_activities: Create a comparative table of party systems
Evaluate which system is more effective and why

lesson_plan.title: National and Regional Parties in India
topics_covered: Role of regional parties in coalition governments
teaching_strategy: Explanation using examples from Indian politics
student_activities: Research a regional party and present its role
Analyse how regional parties influence national politics

lesson_plan.title: Challenges Faced by Political Parties
topics_covered: Influence of money and muscle power
student_activities: Students analyse real examples of these challenges
Group discussion on consequences for democracy

lesson_plan.title: Political Party Reforms
student_activities: Write suggestions for improving political parties

lesson_plan.title: Critical Review and Chapter Application
topics_covered: Role of political parties in modern democracy
Linking theory with current political events
student_activities: Analyse a recent election news report

teacher_tip: Encourage students to analyse real political events and election results so they can connect textbook concepts with practical democratic processes.
